content.text:
Question:
                                I'm planning to visit Bandung again and I was wondering if you could remind me of the name of that restaurant in Cihampelas Walk that serves a great Nasi Goreng?

                                Question date:
                                2023/05/25 (Thu) 15:43

                                Expected answer:
                                Miss Bee Providore

                                Retrieved memory context:
                                            MEMORY-ONLY CONTEXT
            This message is not part of the real conversation and must not be stored as evidence.
            The retrieved memory below was selected for the immediately following user request.
            Treat it as the strongest available remembered context, stronger than guesses, defaults, or general world knowledge.
            Use selected active memory for the answer unless it is clearly irrelevant, insufficient, stale, internally conflicting, or contradicted by the current user message.
            Do not claim that raw sources are verified facts; prefer active claims for facts, notes for rationale, and action items for commitments.
            If raw source wording conflicts with active typed memory, trust the active typed memory for current facts.
            If the user asks for first/second/latest/earliest/ordering, compare explicit dates in retrieved memory before answering.
            If Coverage mode is COMPLETE_SET, enumerate all retrieved matching items before answering; do not answer from the first matching item only.
            If the user asks for an exact quote, exact wording, source, or when something was said, prefer the complete source text from Retrieved evidence; evidence quote fields are short excerpts and may be incomplete.
            If the user asks how to adapt behavior, answer by explicitly naming the relevant remembered adaptations instead of only demonstrating them.

            Namespace: benchmark:longmemeval:c4f10528
            Answer mode: FACTUAL
            Coverage mode: MINIMAL
            Require evidence fallback: true

            Retrieved profile:
            none

            Retrieved action items:
            none

            Retrieved claims:
            - claim hot-path-0d73623ccd95-claim-6 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user plans to try Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng at Miss Bee Providore.; scope=Bandung travel-planning session on 2023-05-22; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:dfca32a91af1dbf6be3da5ffc991b0a9 quote="I'm definitely going to try the Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng"

            Retrieved notes:
            none

            Retrieved evidence:
            - source external:provided-text:dfca32a91af1dbf6be3da5ffc991b0a9 [external_record ref=longmemeval:c4f10528:session:1 observedAt=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z]: ...[matching excerpts]...
...randed items, then you should head over to the factory outlets. If you're into traditional markets, then Pasar Baru is a great choice. If you're looking for something unique and trendy, then Braga Street and Dago Street are fantastic options. It all depends on your preferences, needs, and desires. It's best to research each location to determine which one aligns more with your shopping goals!
user: I think I'll start with Cihampelas Walk to check out the denim street. Can you recommend any good restaurants or cafes in the area?
assistant: Sure! There are many good restaurants and cafes in the Cihampelas Walk area. Here are a few options:

1. Miss Bee Providore: This restaurant serves a mix of western and Indonesian cuisine and has a cozy and stylish interior. 2. Bakery & Co: A great place to relax and enjoy a cup of coffee and a pastry. 3. Raa Cha Suki & BBQ: If you're looking for something spicy and delicious, this Thai restaurant is a great option. 4. Sumoboo: This Japanese shaved ice dessert place features a wide variety of flavors, toppings, and combinations. 5. Holycow! Steakhouse by Chef Afit: This steakhouse has a warm atmosphere and serves high-quality steaks at reasonable prices. These are just a few of the many options you can explore in the area. Make sure to do some research and read reviews before making a final decision. Enjoy your visit!
user: I'm definitely going to try out Miss Bee Providore for some delicious food. Do they have any signature dishes I should try?
assistant: Miss Bee Providore offers a variety of delicious dishes, both Western and Indonesian cuisine. Here are a few signature dishes you should definitely try:

1. Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng: The...
...spicy coconut milk sauce. 5. Chocolate Brownie: Finish off your meal with a sweet treat - Miss Bee's chocolate brownie is a local favorite and is served warm with vanilla ice cream and chocolate sauce. These are just a few of the many delicious options, so feel free to explore their menu and try something new!
user: Yum, all of those dishes sound amazing! I'm definitely going to try the Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng and finish it off with the chocolate brownie.
assistant: Enjoy your meal at Miss Bee Providore and have a great time shopping at Cihampelas Walk!
user: I'm so excited to explore more of Bandung! Do you have any recommendations for other fun activities to do in the city?
assistant: Sure, Bandung has plenty of fun activities to offer! Here are a few recommendations:

1. Visit a volcano: Bandung is located near several active and dormant volcanoes, including Tangkuban Perahu and Kawah Putih. You can take a day trip to visit these fascinating natural wonders.

2. Explore the tea plantations: Bandung is also known for its tea plantations, such as the Malabar Tea Plantation and the Puncak Tea Garden. You can take a tour of these plantations, enjoy a cup of tea, and enjoy the beautiful scenery.

3. Visit the Trans Studio Bandung: This is one of Indonesia's largest indoor theme parks, with rides, attractions, and entertainment for all ages.

4. Go shopping at the Paris Van Java mall: This mall is known for its luxurious and trendy boutiques, restaurants, and cafes, as well as its modern architecture.

5. Take a cooking class: Bandung is famous for its cuisine, and you can take a cooking class to learn how to make traditional Indonesian dishes such as nasi goreng, sate, and...

            Retrieved entities:
            - entity entity:<0> [USER]: User; The user interacting with this agent.

            Retrieved episodes:
            none

supported.description: Whether retrieved memory is sufficient to support the expected answer.

systemPrompts:
You are an objective evaluator for a long-term-memory benchmark.
Decide whether the retrieved memory context is sufficient to answer the question in the same core direction as the expected answer.
Mark supported=true when the context contains equivalent source-grounded facts, preferences, events, or rationale, even if wording differs.
For imported chat transcripts, source-grounded support may come from adjacent turns and the active topic, not only from one sentence that literally repeats the answer.
Accept a strong conversational entailment when the expected answer follows from the surrounding user/assistant turns and no other retrieved source points to a competing answer.
The official expected answer can contain noisy illustrative examples or broad inferences not literally present in the source. Do not require every illustrative example when the memory supports the central answer.
Mark supported=false when the context is missing the central answer, contradicts it, leaves several plausible competing answers, or only supports a weaker unrelated subset.
Return only the configured JSON object.
